note: Baseline: every team assumed to own its own 1st/2nd-round picks (NBA, 2027-2033) unless overridden below. Real trade overlays researched via web search against ESPN/NBA.com/team-beat reporting on 2026-07-08 — covers the major picks-for-star trades of the 2026 offseason (Giannis Antetokounmpo, Kawhi Leonard, Jaylen Brown/Paul George, LaMelo Ball, Miles Bridges, Walker Kessler). This is NOT an exhaustive 30-team ledger (RealGM and Spotrac, the comprehensive trade-tracker sites, both block automated fetches) — smaller/older pick trades not listed here default to "each team owns its own". Hand-update this file as new trades happen; never auto-regenerate it from a script.

picks.trade_note: Pick swap rights, via Kawhi Leonard trade (2026)

picks.protection_note: Conditional swap: if this pick (originally the Clippers') lands top-16 and Philadelphia's own 2028 first is top-8, Boston gets swap rights between the two instead of the pick outright; if the Clippers' pick falls outside the top 16 and Philadelphia's own pick is outside the top 8, Boston receives the Clippers' pick outright and keeps its own 2028 first.
